records.m_Talk_ENG: The elite from the Academy, Naielle Bluesteel! And the extraordinary magician from the Academy, Mikaj[Star!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knew I'd be paired up with you? Fate can really be annoying sometimes.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knew I'd be paired up with you? Fate can really be annoying sometimes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I'm sick of being on the same team with you, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I'm sick of being on the same team with you, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I'm sick of being on the same team with you, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since we are, I'll do my best. Let's win this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since we are, I'll do my best. Let's win this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Just make sure not to slow me down, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And here are their opponents!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And here are their opponents!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And here are their opponents!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counters Legacy's top ranker, Mi Rinaej[Starlight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counters Legacy's top ranker, Mi Rinaej[Starlight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counters Legacy's top ranker, Mi Rinaej[Starlight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?! Mi Rinae?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?! Mi Rinae?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?! Mi Rinae?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And her teammate, the one who miraculously won all rounds by default, Cho Hojin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And her teammate, the one who miraculously won all rounds by default, Cho Hojin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And her teammate, the one who miraculously won all rounds by default, Cho Hojin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's an honor to be on your side, Ms. Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's an honor to be on your side, Ms. Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's an honor to be on your side, Ms. Mi Rinae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aight. Hojin, are ya? Let's win this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aight. Hojin, are ya? Let's win this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aight. Hojin, are ya? Let's win this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! I'll do my best!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I'll do my best!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll do my best!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we finally meet, you smug blonde-hair! Hope you're ready for a beating!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we finally meet, you smug blonde-hair! Hope you're ready for a beating!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we finally meet, you smug blonde-hair! Hope you're ready for a beating!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Did ya get stronger since the last time we met?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Did ya get stronger since the last time we met?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Did ya get stronger since the last time we met?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think I've met your friend over there. But I did see ya compete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think I've met your friend over there. But I did see ya compete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think I've met your friend over there. But I did see ya compete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aight. Let's see how much ya learned from Bora and Dain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aight. Let's see how much ya learned from Bora and Dain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aight. Let's see how much ya learned from Bora and Dain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get so cocky!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get so cocky!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get so cocky!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? I couldn't even react...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? I couldn't even react...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? I couldn't even react...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how excited ya are, don't ya think you're bein' too reckless?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how excited ya are, don't ya think you're bein' too reckless?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how excited ya are, don't ya think you're bein' too reckless?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't think that you're better than me for landing one lucky shot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't think that you're better than me for landing one lucky shot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't think that you're better than me for landing one lucky shot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? That one was a little close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? That one was a little close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? That one was a little close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krrrgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krrrgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krrrgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Gotcha again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Gotcha again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Gotcha again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mika, are ya just gon' stand there or help her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mika, are ya just gon' stand there or help her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mika, are ya just gon' stand there or help her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I am! I was just trying to come up with a plan!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I am! I was just trying to come up with a plan!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I am! I was just trying to come up with a plan!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, the Academy duo is no match against the top ranker!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, the Academy duo is no match against the top ranker!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, the Academy duo is no match against the top ranker!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cho Hojin is avoiding all the traps Mika had set up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cho Hojin is avoiding all the traps Mika had set up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cho Hojin is avoiding all the traps Mika had set up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is not a matter of luck anymore! It's just so incredible to watch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is not a matter of luck anymore! It's just so incredible to watch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is not a matter of luck anymore! It's just so incredible to watch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will the Academy duo be able to overcome this huge obstacle?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will the Academy duo be able to overcome this huge obstacle?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will the Academy duo be able to overcome this huge obstacle?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew Rinae would be ranked number one there too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew Rinae would be ranked number one there too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew Rinae would be ranked number one there too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nice seeing her have fun, but I still wish she'd go a little easier on them...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nice seeing her have fun, but I still wish she'd go a little easier on them...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nice seeing her have fun, but I still wish she'd go a little easier on them...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's always serious about it... The match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's always serious about it... The match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's always serious about it... The match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha hah. Well, she wouldn't be Rinae if she didn't care about winning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha hah. Well, she wouldn't be Rinae if she didn't care about winning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha hah. Well, she wouldn't be Rinae if she didn't care about winning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... why did she even enter the tournament in the first place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... why did she even enter the tournament in the first place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... why did she even enter the tournament in the first place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She wanted to see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She wanted to see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She wanted to see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ground One's Counters'...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ground One's Counters'...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ground One's Counters'...

records.m_Talk_ENG: and the Academy's... skills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and the Academy's... skills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and the Academy's... skills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! She's only targeting me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! She's only targeting me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! She's only targeting me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Don't act so weak. Get up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Don't act so weak. Get up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Don't act so weak. Get up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all ya got, Miss Elite? I'm a bit disappointed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all ya got, Miss Elite? I'm a bit disappointed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all ya got, Miss Elite? I'm a bit disappointed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think your taunts are going to fool me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think your taunts are going to fool me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think your taunts are going to fool me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaack!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaack!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaack!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what do I do...? Those two are fighting, but I'm doing nothing...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what do I do...? Those two are fighting, but I'm doing nothing...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what do I do...? Those two are fighting, but I'm doing nothing...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every mine Hojin steps on seems to be a dud, and some mines even hurt Naielle, so I can't plant anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every mine Hojin steps on seems to be a dud, and some mines even hurt Naielle, so I can't plant anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every mine Hojin steps on seems to be a dud, and some mines even hurt Naielle, so I can't plant anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... Okay. Let's try it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... Okay. Let's try it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... Okay. Let's try it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now... there's no other option left!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now... there's no other option left!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now... there's no other option left!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle! Let's do the thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle! Let's do the thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle! Let's do the thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How am I supposed to know what you're talking about?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How am I supposed to know what you're talking about?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How am I supposed to know what you're talking about?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to cast a victory spell on you right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to cast a victory spell on you right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to cast a victory spell on you right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... we're going to win!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... we're going to win!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... we're going to win!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, your face...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, your face...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, your face...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-eeek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-eeek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-eeek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not serious, are you...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not serious, are you...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not serious, are you...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you really going to do it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you really going to do it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you really going to do it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't come any closer to me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't come any closer to me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't come any closer to me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* It seems I have embarrassed myself in front of my peers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* It seems I have embarrassed myself in front of my peers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* It seems I have embarrassed myself in front of my peers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But worry not! For I have come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But worry not! For I have come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But worry not! For I have come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mi Rinae. You best be on your toes from now on!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mi Rinae. You best be on your toes from now on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what the heck is that...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what the heck is that...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what the heck is that...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's Mika's transformation when she decides to give it her all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's Mika's transformation when she decides to give it her all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's Mika's transformation when she decides to give it her all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only a few people at the Academy have ever seen her like this. But she's as amazing as the rumors say she is!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only a few people at the Academy have ever seen her like this. But she's as amazing as the rumors say she is!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only a few people at the Academy have ever seen her like this. But she's as amazing as the rumors say she is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel the power flowing within me... So it might be possible now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel the power flowing within me... So it might be possible now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel the power flowing within me... So it might be possible now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To have the best battle... in which I will leave no regrets!
records.m_Talk_DEU: To have the best battle... in which I will leave no regrets!
records.m_Talk_FRA: To have the best battle... in which I will leave no regrets!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it! It's Death Omen Star! That's no victory spell!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is right. We have no chance of winning unless we do this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ground One's Counters'...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ground One's Counters'...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ground One's Counters'...

root.m_Talk_ENG: and the Academy's... skills.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and the Academy's... skills.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and the Academy's... skills.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! She's only targeting me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! She's only targeting me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! She's only targeting me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Don't act so weak. Get up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Don't act so weak. Get up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Don't act so weak. Get up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all ya got, Miss Elite? I'm a bit disappointed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all ya got, Miss Elite? I'm a bit disappointed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all ya got, Miss Elite? I'm a bit disappointed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think your taunts are going to fool me?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think your taunts are going to fool me?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think your taunts are going to fool me?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaack!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaack!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaack!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what do I do...? Those two are fighting, but I'm doing nothing...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what do I do...? Those two are fighting, but I'm doing nothing...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what do I do...? Those two are fighting, but I'm doing nothing...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every mine Hojin steps on seems to be a dud, and some mines even hurt Naielle, so I can't plant anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every mine Hojin steps on seems to be a dud, and some mines even hurt Naielle, so I can't plant anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every mine Hojin steps on seems to be a dud, and some mines even hurt Naielle, so I can't plant anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... Okay. Let's try it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... Okay. Let's try it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... Okay. Let's try it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now... there's no other option left!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now... there's no other option left!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now... there's no other option left!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle! Let's do the thing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle! Let's do the thing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle! Let's do the thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How am I supposed to know what you're talking about?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How am I supposed to know what you're talking about?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How am I supposed to know what you're talking about?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to cast a victory spell on you right now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to cast a victory spell on you right now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to cast a victory spell on you right now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And... we're going to win!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And... we're going to win!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And... we're going to win!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, your face...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, your face...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, your face...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: E-eeek!
root.m_Talk_DEU: E-eeek!
root.m_Talk_FRA: E-eeek!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not serious, are you...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not serious, are you...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not serious, are you...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you really going to do it?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you really going to do it?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you really going to do it?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't come any closer to me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't come any closer to me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't come any closer to me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* It seems I have embarrassed myself in front of my peers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* It seems I have embarrassed myself in front of my peers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* It seems I have embarrassed myself in front of my peers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But worry not! For I have come.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But worry not! For I have come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But worry not! For I have come.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mi Rinae. You best be on your toes from now on!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mi Rinae. You best be on your toes from now on!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mi Rinae. You best be on your toes from now on!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what the heck is that...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what the heck is that...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what the heck is that...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's Mika's transformation when she decides to give it her all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's Mika's transformation when she decides to give it her all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's Mika's transformation when she decides to give it her all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only a few people at the Academy have ever seen her like this. But she's as amazing as the rumors say she is!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only a few people at the Academy have ever seen her like this. But she's as amazing as the rumors say she is!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only a few people at the Academy have ever seen her like this. But she's as amazing as the rumors say she is!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel the power flowing within me... So it might be possible now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel the power flowing within me... So it might be possible now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel the power flowing within me... So it might be possible now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To have the best battle... in which I will leave no regrets!
root.m_Talk_DEU: To have the best battle... in which I will leave no regrets!
root.m_Talk_FRA: To have the best battle... in which I will leave no regrets!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it! It's Death Omen Star! That's no victory spell!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it! It's Death Omen Star! That's no victory spell!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it! It's Death Omen Star! That's no victory spell!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is right. We have no chance of winning unless we do this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is right. We have no chance of winning unless we do this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is right. We have no chance of winning unless we do this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our opponent is our strongest enemy! There is no room for hesitation!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our opponent is our strongest enemy! There is no room for hesitation!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our opponent is our strongest enemy! There is no room for hesitation!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What I, Mika, want is... the fist of victory!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What I, Mika, want is... the fist of victory!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I, Mika, want is... the fist of victory!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait! I need to get up first!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait! I need to get up first!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait! I need to get up first!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get up quickly! Fight and win, or lose and die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get up quickly! Fight and win, or lose and die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get up quickly! Fight and win, or lose and die!
